title: SSkins Mouth
description:
🎨 Custom Skin Servers — 64-2048px!
Now supports custom mouths for truly unique faces!
body:
# 🗣️ Dimension Studio – Mouth Animation Mod

Bring your character to life with our mouth open/close system — now available for rental through Dimension Studio!

This mod enables players to toggle a visible mouth animation on their Minecraft character, enhancing roleplay realism, visual storytelling, and more.

---

## 🛠️ Setup Instructions

1. Download and install the mod (Fabric 1.20.1+ required).
2. Launch the game once to initialize the mod.
3. After launching, go to our official pricing & plan selector:  
   👉 https://mouth.dimension-studio.net
4. Search for your Minecraft username in the input field.
5. Select your desired plan (e.g. Normal, Premium, with or without mouth).
6. Your selection will be applied and synced with the mod automatically.
7. In-game, press K to open the skin management UI.
8. Drag and drop your skin to enable or disable the mouth animation.

🧠 Full user guide:  
https://sskins-docs.dimension-studio.net/guide-mouth/how-to-use

---

## 💸 Pricing (Solo Use)

| Package         | Price (THB) | Skin Resolution | Mouth System |
|-----------------|-------------|------------------|---------------|
| Normal          | 35฿         | 64–512px         | ❌ No          |
| Normal + Mouth  | 45฿         | 64–512px         | ✅ Yes         |
| Premium         | 50฿         | 64–2048px        | ❌ No          |
| Premium + Mouth | 60฿         | 64–2048px        | ✅ Yes         |

> For group or RP project rentals, please contact us for custom pricing based on player count.

🌐 Plan selection: https://mouth.dimension-studio.net
